HomePage.metaTitle: TiniX Repo Trending — Track Rising Open Source Projects
HomePage.metaDesc: Track trending projects, models, and datasets across GitHub and HuggingFace. Momentum-based rankings updated daily with community reviews and AI-powered summaries.
HomePage.heroDesc: Momentum-based rankings across GitHub & HuggingFace. Discover trending repos, models, and datasets.
HomePage.aboutWidgetDesc: We track momentum across GitHub & HuggingFace to surface rising projects before they hit mainstream. Updated hourly.

About.title: About - Tinix
About.description: About Tinix Repo Trending - Tracking momentum across open source.
About.intro1: Tinix Repo Trending is an advanced open-source project tracker designed to identify projects gaining early momentum before they hit the mainstream.
About.intro2: We continuously monitor both GitHub and HuggingFace to calculate a unique Velocity Score based on a proprietary algorithm that weights stars, forks, contributors, and downloads over specific time periods.
About.step1Desc: Automated workers crawl GitHub repositories and HuggingFace models/datasets periodically to capture snapshots of their metrics.
About.step2Desc: We compare current metrics with historical snapshots (e.g. 7 days ago) to determine the absolute growth (deltas) of a project.
About.step4Desc: Projects are automatically categorized using metadata and LLM-powered summarization.
About.openSourceDesc: Tinix Repo Trending is proudly open source. You can view the code, contribute, or run your own instance.

SocialListening.title: Social Discussions - TiniX
SocialListening.description: Live developer discussions about open source projects across X, Reddit, and Hacker News.
SocialListening.subtitle: Real-time stream of public developer discussions and mentions for top open source and AI/ML projects.
SocialListening.noMentionsDesc: Check back later or submit a project to trigger social scanning.

Compare.noSocialMentions: No recent social discussions found for this project.
